name: elite-hire-consultancy-maintenance-system
description: Elite Hire Consultancy Maintenance System - MERN Application

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
scripts.dev: concurrently -n client,server -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev --prefix client" "npm run dev --prefix server"
